div.p: Your trusted partner for organized digital transformation

Techrise is a specialized entity providing comprehensive technical and administrative solutions. As an accredited partner of the Odoo platform, we support companies and organizations in rebuilding their operational processes according to a modern digital methodology based on organization, accuracy, and sustainability.

We focus on transforming operational complexity into intelligent, interconnected systems that enable different departments to work within a unified framework, ensuring data clarity, ease of monitoring, and improved institutional performance efficiency.
Headquartered in Abu Dhabi, UAE, we serve clients across the Middle East and beyond, delivering solutions that respect local regulations while meeting international standards.

Our philosophy is based on the belief that true technological solutions are those built to serve the business, not complicate it. Therefore, we strive to simplify procedures, reduce manual intervention, and enhance integration between systems and different departments.

We aim to be the trusted technology partner that organizations rely on to build an organized work environment, scalable systems, and a clear digital vision that supports growth with confidence and continuity.
The principles that drive everything we do at Techrise.
We strive for the highest quality in every solution, every interaction, and every deliverable.
We embrace new technologies and creative approaches to solve complex business challenges.
We build lasting relationships based on trust, transparency, and shared success with our clients.
Whether you're a client looking for the best Odoo partner or a talented professional seeking exciting challenges, we'd love to hear from you.
Comprehensive digital solutions from implementation to ongoing support

We design and develop comprehensive ERP systems based on the Odoo platform, tailored to the specific nature of each business and its operational needs. We start with a thorough analysis of internal processes, then customize the system to cover various departments.

ul.li: Accounting, Sales, Inventory, HR, and Procurement
Customer Service, Call Centers, and POS systems
Multi-branch centralized monitoring
Social media and marketing integration
Data unification and real-time performance tracking

div.p: We provide professional website design and development services, focusing on the integration of a strong visual identity with user-friendly functionality. We ensure websites are responsive across all devices with fast loading and great UX.

ul.li: Corporate identity-driven website design
Responsive across all devices and screens
Fast loading and high performance
Best UX/UI practices
Integration with Odoo or other systems

div.p: We design and develop mobile applications for Android and iOS, with a strong focus on high performance, security, and seamless integration with Odoo or any other platforms used within the organization.

ul.li: Android and iOS native development
Seamless Odoo system integration
Thorough testing before launch
Ongoing technical support post-deployment
Scalable architecture for business growth

div.p: We implement integration processes between the Odoo system and other software used within the company, as well as connectivity with official authorities and platforms, contributing to data unification, reduced manual work, and faster operational procedures.

ul.li: Odoo integration with third-party software
Government portal connectivity (VAT, customs)
Payment gateway integration
WhatsApp and communication tools
E-commerce platform connection

div.p: We provide comprehensive services for organizing and managing accounts, VAT filing, Corporate Tax returns, and establishing qualified accounting teams with clear policies and procedures.

ul.li: VAT return preparation and filing
Corporate Tax annual return filing
Accounting organization and restructuring
Establishment of qualified accounting teams
Financial policies, workflows, and internal controls
Odoo accounting system configuration

div.p: We provide comprehensive branding and marketing services focused on building a strong and clear brand identity capable of effectively communicating with its audience and establishing a meaningful market presence.

ul.li: Brand essence and core message definition
Visual identity development
Marketing content creation
Smart campaigns integrated with operational systems
Performance measurement and analytics

div.p: We offer annual technical support and maintenance contracts to ensure system stability and optimal performance throughout the year. These services include regular monitoring, updates, and prompt resolution of any technical issues.

ul.li: Regular system monitoring
Implementation of necessary updates
Prompt technical issue resolution
Performance optimization
Uninterrupted business operations guarantee

div.p: Every business is unique. Let's discuss how we can tailor our services to meet your specific requirements.
Reliable infrastructure for your Odoo and business applications

We provide reliable, high-performance server hosting solutions specifically optimized for Odoo ERP and business applications. Our infrastructure ensures your systems run smoothly with maximum uptime and security.
Whether you need cloud hosting, dedicated servers, or hybrid solutions, we configure and manage the entire infrastructure so you can focus on your business.
Everything you need for reliable, secure, and fast hosting.
SSD-powered servers with optimized configurations for Odoo, ensuring fast response times and smooth operations.
SSL certificates, firewall protection, regular security audits, and encrypted backups to keep your data safe.
Guaranteed high availability with redundant systems, load balancing, and 24/7 monitoring.
Daily automated backups with secure offsite storage and quick disaster recovery options.
Easily scale CPU, RAM, and storage as your business grows without downtime or migration hassle.
Expert server administration, OS updates, performance tuning, and troubleshooting included.
Choose the hosting solution that best fits your needs.
Flexible cloud-based hosting with auto-scaling capabilities. Perfect for growing businesses that need elastic resources.

ul.li: Auto-scaling resources
Pay-as-you-grow model
Global CDN included

div.p: Full dedicated server resources for enterprise-level performance and maximum control.

ul.li: Dedicated CPU & RAM
Full root access
Custom configurations

div.p: Fully managed Odoo-specific hosting with optimized PostgreSQL, Nginx, and worker configurations.

ul.li: Odoo-optimized stack
Automatic updates
Staging environment

div.p: Let us handle your infrastructure so you can focus on your business. Get in touch for a custom hosting solution.
Let's start a conversation about your digital transformation
Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

textarea.name: body
textarea.placeholder: Tell us about your project and requirements...

div.p: We're here to help you navigate your digital transformation journey. Reach out to us through any of these channels.

div.span: Abu Dhabi, Al Bateen Commercial Tower

div.p: How we collect, use, and protect your information
Last updated: April 17, 2026

Techrise ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website techriseae.com or use our services.

Techrise is headquartered in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, and operates in compliance with applicable UAE data protection regulations, including UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on the Protection of Personal Data.

ul.li: Full name, email address, phone number, and company name (via our contact form)
Service interests and project details you share with us
Job application data including resume, LinkedIn profile, and qualifications (via career applications)
Browser type, device information, and operating system
IP address and approximate geographic location
Pages visited, time spent on pages, and referring URLs
Cookies and similar tracking technologies

div.p: We use the information we collect to:

ul.li: Respond to your inquiries and provide requested services
Process and manage ERP implementation, web development, and other service engagements
Evaluate job applications and manage recruitment processes
Send relevant updates about our services (only with your consent)
Improve our website functionality and user experience
Comply with legal obligations and protect our rights

div.p: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

ul.li: Service Providers: With trusted partners who assist us in operating our website and delivering services (e.g., hosting providers, CRM platforms)
Legal Requirements: When required by UAE law, regulation, or legal process
Business Transfers: In connection with any merger, acquisition, or sale of company assets
With Your Consent: When you have given us explicit permission to share your data

div.p: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us understand how you interact with our site.

ul.li: Essential Cookies: Required for the website to function properly (session management, security)
Analytics Cookies: Help us understand website traffic and usage patterns

div.p: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:

ul.li: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmitted through our website
Secure server infrastructure with access controls
Regular security assessments and updates
Employee training on data protection practices

div.p: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. Contact form submissions are retained for the duration of the business relationship. Job application data is retained for up to 12 months after the recruitment process concludes.
Under applicable data protection laws, you have the right to:

ul.li: Access the personal information we hold about you
Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
Request deletion of your personal data
Object to or restrict certain data processing activities
Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent

div.p: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at info@techriseae.com.

Our website may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before providing any personal information.

Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child, we will take steps to delete it promptly.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

ul.li: Al Bateen Commercial Tower, Abu Dhabi, UAE

div.p: The rules governing your use of our website and services
Last updated: April 17, 2026

Welcome to Techrise. By accessing or using techriseae.com (the "Website") or engaging any of our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions ("Terms"). If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not use our Website or services.
Techrise is a company headquartered in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, operating in compliance with UAE laws and regulations.
Techrise provides the following professional services:

ul.li: Odoo ERP implementation, customization, and ongoing support
Website design and development
Mobile application development (iOS and Android)
System integration and API development
Accounting and tax advisory services
Branding and digital marketing
Server, hosting, and cloud infrastructure management

div.p: Specific service deliverables, timelines, and fees are governed by a separate written agreement or Statement of Work (SOW) signed between Techrise and the client.
You agree to use our Website only for lawful purposes. You must not:

ul.li: Use the Website in a way that violates any applicable UAE or international law
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Website or our systems
Transmit any viruses, malware, or other harmful code
Engage in automated scraping, data mining, or similar activities without consent
Impersonate any person or entity or misrepresent your affiliation

div.p: All content on this Website — including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, icons, videos, software, and design — is the property of Techrise or its licensors and is protected by UAE and international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works from, publicly display, or otherwise exploit any content on this Website without our prior written permission.
"Techrise" and the Techrise logo are trademarks of Techrise. "Odoo" is a trademark of Odoo S.A. and is used here under the terms of the official Odoo Partner program.
When engaging our services, clients agree to:

ul.li: Provide accurate, complete, and timely information required for service delivery
Cooperate reasonably with the Techrise team throughout the project lifecycle
Designate authorized representatives to make decisions on behalf of the client
Pay all fees in accordance with the agreed payment schedule
Maintain appropriate backups of their own data and systems

div.p: Fees for our services are set out in the applicable quotation, proposal, or SOW. Unless otherwise agreed in writing:

ul.li: All fees are quoted in AED (UAE Dirhams) and are exclusive of VAT unless stated
Invoices are payable within 14 days of issue
Late payments may incur interest at the maximum rate permitted under UAE law
Techrise reserves the right to suspend service delivery for overdue accounts

div.p: We strive to deliver our services with reasonable skill and care, consistent with industry standards. However, the Website and its content are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.

We do not warrant that the Website will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components. Third-party platforms (including Odoo, hosting providers, and integrations) are subject to their own terms and availability.

To the maximum extent permitted by UAE law, Techrise, its directors, employees, and affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages — including loss of profits, revenue, data, or business opportunities — arising from your use of the Website or our services.
Our total aggregate liability for any claim arising from a service engagement shall not exceed the total fees paid by the client for the specific service in the 12 months preceding the claim.

You agree to indemnify and hold Techrise harmless from any claims, damages, liabilities, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your breach of these Terms, your misuse of the Website, or your violation of any applicable law or third-party right.

Our Website and services may integrate with or link to third-party platforms such as Odoo, Google, Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and payment gateways. We are not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of these third parties. Your use of such services is governed by their respective terms.

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Website at any time, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties. Termination of a service engagement is governed by the applicable SOW or service agreement.

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates, and any disputes arising from or relating to these Terms or your use of the Website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of Abu Dhabi, UAE.

We may update these Terms from time to time to reflect changes in our services, legal requirements, or business practices. Updated Terms will be posted on this page with a revised "Last updated" date. Continued use of the Website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:

ul.li: Al Bateen Commercial Tower, Abu Dhabi, UAE

div.p: Thank you for reaching out to us. Our team will review your inquiry and get back to you within 24 hours.
